title: Soren's Create With Friends
description: A Lightweight Modpack focused on the Create Mod & Performance Optimization
body: This modpackis a lightweight collection of mods with a focus on supporting the Create mod and adding several QOL improvements and Optomizations. Gameplay Mods: The ONLY large gameplay mod is the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and several add-ons for additional features to Create. [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) is added as a storage solution. Optimizations: There are numerous Client Side optimization mods in this pack including; [Ferrite-Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [MemoryLeakFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix), [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)... and more! Icon Source: Gear icons created by Freepik - Flaticon
